refreshToken.description: Refresh token for obtaining new access tokens, or null if not supported

expiresAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the access token expires

user.description: Authenticated user information, or null if not available

email.description: User email address, or null if not provided

name.description: User display name, or null if not provided

profileImage.description: URL to user profile image, or null if not provided
